series_metadata.series_description: These files contaiin new branch applications that have been approved, denied, or withdrawn.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed on computer, or five (5) years date of application. Upon confirmation that paper copy was checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years date of applica-tion ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years date of application
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
